name: python3-shtab
title: python3-shtab
summary: Automagic shell tab completion for Python CLI applications
description:
Automagic shell tab completion for Python CLI applications
Automatically generate shell tab completion scripts for Python CLI apps.
shtab processes an argparse.ArgumentParser object to generate
a tab completion script for your shell.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.

commands.name: shtab
commands.description: Automagic shell tab completion for Python CLI applications

arguments.description: Raise errors if the specified parser is not found in $PYTHONPATH. By default, import

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use shtab because Automagic shell tab completion for Python CLI applications.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use shtab as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `shtab [OPTIONS] PARSER` as documented upstream for shtab.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `shtab --shell=bash myapp.main.get_parser | sudo tee "$BASH_COMPLETION_COMPAT_DIR"/myapp` as documented upstream for shtab.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `shtab --shell=zsh  myapp.main.get_parser  |  sudo  tee  /usr/local/share/zsh/site-func-` as documented upstream for shtab.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `shtab --shell=tcsh myapp.main.get_parser | sudo tee /etc/profile.d/myapp.completion.csh` as documented upstream for shtab.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair shtab with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `shtab --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install python-shtab. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `shtab --shell=bash myapp.main.get_parser | sudo tee "$BASH_COMPLETION_COMPAT_DIR"/myapp`. Further invocations from upstream: `shtab --shell=zsh  myapp.main.get_parser  |  sudo  tee  /usr/local/share/zsh/site-func-`; `shtab --shell=tcsh myapp.main.get_parser | sudo tee /etc/profile.d/myapp.completion.csh`. Automagic shell tab completion for Python CLI applications.

documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: shtab - Automagic shell tab completion for Python CLI applications.
